scripts.test:fast: NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/src/cli.test.ts tests/src/family-domain-catalog.test.ts tests/src/family-entry-contracts.test.ts tests/src/product-entry-companions.test.ts tests/src/product-entry-program-companions.test.ts tests/src/family-orchestration.test.ts tests/src/runtime-task-companions.test.ts tests/src/skill-catalog.test.ts tests/src/automation-companions.test.ts
scripts.test:artifact: npm run build && NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 node --test tests/built/**/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:full: npm run test:fast && npm run test:meta && npm run test:artifact
